item.title: 使用 javascript、bitbucket 管道和 bitbucket api 自动创建从一个分支到另一个分支的拉取请求 | Automating pull request creation from one branch to another using javascript, bitbucket pipelines and bitbucket api
item.description:
1. 什么是 bitbucket 管道，如何以及在何处使用它
  2. 在您的项目中自动化拉取请求的优势是什么？
  3. 自动化工作的先决条件
  4. 使用 bitbucket 管道自动执行拉取请求
  5. 使用 bitbucket 管道和 javascript 自动执行拉取请求

它允许您根据存储库中的配置文件自动构建、测试甚至部署代码。 本质上，我们为您在云中创建容器。 在这些容器中，您可以运行命令（就像在本地计算机上一样），但具有全新系统的所有优势，可根据您的需要进行定制和配置（ 了解如何开始）。

这些命令包括安装包、使用 curl 发出 api 请求、存储变量、运行 javascript 任务等等。 现在我们拥有存储变量和安装包、发出 api 请求和运行 javascript 任务的优势，我们可以在您的 bitbucket 存储库中创建从一个分支到另一个分支的拉取请求。

这些操作包括但不限于创建拉取请求、合并拉取请求、将代码部署到远程服务器、单元测试、e2e 测试、在 package.json 文件中调整版本、读取和写入文件等等。 在 clickpesa，我们使用 bitbucket 管道来完成所有这些操作。

在您的项目中自动化拉取请求的优势是什么？

  • 改进开发过程（贡献者不必手动创建 PR 到另一个分支）
  • 减少人为错误，例如将 PR 创建到错误的分支
  • 对于拥有大量成员/开发人员的团队很有用
  • 帮助格式化 PR 描述。 这有助于审阅者在合并到另一个分支之前了解 PR 中的哪些变化。

先决条件

验证您的工作区以被授权代表您执行操作。

一世。 在您的工作区中创建一个 OAuth 使用者。 转到您的 bitbucket 工作区 → 设置 → OAuth 消费者 → 添加消费者

填写所需信息，尤其是名称，并为您的新消费者授予不同操作的权限，但在我们的例子中，我们将授予读取和写入拉取请求的权限。 确保选中 This is a private consumer 复选框和回调 url（您可以添加任何 url）。

保存消费者后，点击消费者查看key和secret

打开另一个选项卡并访问将自动执行拉取请求的存储库。 如果您的存储库中没有 bitbucket 管道，则应暂时跳过此部分并查看步骤 v 。 此操作需要管理员访问权限。 访问存储库后​​，转到存储库设置→存储库变量（在这里我们应该能够添加变量）。

创建一个名称为 BB_AUTH_STRING 的变量，其值应添加为键：值，例如 VzW7ubArG8T3huEDXs:eRNqGCycMVPvfzsGhEyd7xP33tYLd2jZ，此变量应受到保护。 现在我们可以将此值用作管道中的变量来验证用户。

恭喜，您已经创建了第一个 bitbucket 管道，在此过程之后返回步骤 c。

脚步

注意：.yml 文件在其脚本中具有一组规则，例如缩进规则

仅使用管道创建拉取请求

一世。 我们已经创建了管道，删除所有项目，让我们重新开始，让我们使用管道运行 hello world 脚本，bitbucket 管道包含每个用户选择的一堆管道，现在让我们坚持使用分支，管道只有在更改时才会工作被推送到分支

pipelines: branches: master: - step: name: first pipelines script: - echo " - ✨ Hello World!!"

输出

这些简单的事情已经够多了，让我们进入主题。 首先，我们需要创建一个新的分支，比如开发，我们将自动从开发到主分支的拉取请求。

  • 在管道中，将分支名称从 master 更改为 development。 然后安装curl和jq，curl用来在终端发出api请求，jq用来格式化响应。
 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq

使用我们之前保存的身份验证变量，创建一个 curl 请求来获取授权令牌。 将其存储在 bitbucket 变量中，例如 BB_TOKEN。 使用 jq 从响应中提取令牌。

 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - echo $BB_TOKEN
  • 让我们使用管道创建我们的第一个拉取请求。
 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - echo $BB_TOKEN - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description": "", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": ' [] ' }'
  • 恭喜，你已经用管道创建了你的第一个 PR

我们为拉取请求创建了最简单的请求，在复杂部分我们需要动态添加默认审阅者和描述（来自提交）。

  • 首先通过在创建拉取请求之前运行另一个 curl 请求来获取项目的默认审阅者。 使用 jq 格式化响应以仅包含审阅者的 uuid 数组，贡献者不能是审阅者。
 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - echo $BB_TOKEN - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS = $( curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS
  • 在拉取请求负载中传递创建的默认审阅者数组。
 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - echo $BB_TOKEN - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS = $( curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description": "", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": ' " ${ DEFAULT_REVIEWERS } " ' }'

在这一部分中，我们可以有来自其他分支的提交，其中包括以合并在 {branch name} 开头的提交消息，我们不需要将其显示给审阅者，可以过滤提交以省略不需要的提交，创建一个空字符串变量并循环返回的提交，如果它适合空字符串，则在每个循环中附加提交。

 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - > export COMMITS = $( curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /commits" ) - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES = "" - export value = "" - > for i in $( jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< " $COMMITS " ) ; do value = $( jq -r ".values[ $i ]" <<< ${ COMMITS } ) message = $( jq -r '.message' <<< " $value " ) - if [[ " $message " != * "Merge" * ]] ; then COMMIT_MESSAGES = " $COMMIT_MESSAGES > " $message " \n\n " - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES
  • 将获取的字符串添加到拉取请求负载的描述部分并提交，拉取请求的标题也可以动态更改。
 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS = $( curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > export COMMITS = $( curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /commits" ) - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES = "" - export value = "" - > for i in $( jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< " $COMMITS " ) ; do value = $( jq -r ".values[ $i ]" <<< ${ COMMITS } ) message = $( jq -r '.message' <<< " $value " ) - if [[ " $message " != * "Merge" * ]] ; then COMMIT_MESSAGES = " $COMMIT_MESSAGES > " $message " \n\n " - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description":"' " ${ COMMIT_MESSAGES } " '", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": ' " ${ DEFAULT_REVIEWERS } " ' }'
  • 通过在某个点玩这个，拉取请求创建将返回错误 400 - 错误请求，并且不会给出进一步的错误描述。 不用担心有一个解决方案。

替代解决方案（使用 javascript）

  1. 可以使用 fetch api 或 axios 使用 javascript 创建拉取请求。
 const headers = { " Content-Type " : " application/json " , Authorization : `Bearer ${ authorization token } ` , }; const postData = { title : `title` , description : `description` , source : { branch : { name : `develop` , }, }, destination : { branch : { name : " master " , }, }, close_source_branch : false , reviewers : [], }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ repo_owner } / ${ repo_name } /pullrequests` const { data } = axios . post ( url , postData , { headers }); console . log ( data )

但是这个函数不能直接在管道中调用，这就是Gulp Js的用武之地。为此我们需要安装几个包，（这个操作需要nodejs）

 npm install gulp axios –save-dev
  • 创建一个名为 gulpfile.js 的文件。
  • 使用 gulp，我们可以在 javascript 中创建一个任务并在管道中调用该任务，该管道将调用该任务在 javascript 中定义的函数。
  • 在 gulpfile 中创建任务 createpr。 提交您的更改并推送。 检查 bitbucket 管道并创建拉取请求
const gulp = require ( " gulp " ); const axios = require ( " axios " ). default ; gulp . task ( " createpr " , async () => { const headers = { " Content-Type " : " application/json " , // make sure to pass the token Authorization : `Bearer ${ authorization_token } ` , }; const postData = { title : “ title ” , description : “” , source : { branch : { name : “ develop ” , }, }, destination : { branch : { name : " master " , }, }, close_source_branch : false , reviewers : [], }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ repo_owner } / ${ repo_name } /pullrequests` const { data } = axios . post ( url , postData , { headers }); console . log ( data ) }
 # nodejs image is required image: node:14.16.1 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq # install gulp globally - npm i -g gulp # this will list all defined tasks in the gulpfile we've created - gulp –tasks - gulp createpr # this will call the function we defined to create pull request.

由于我们需要来自管道的变量，例如授权令牌、分支名称、repo 名称、提交等，任务将使用process.argv[variable number]从管道接收变量，变量编号是管道中定义的变量的位置例如我们的任务是 createpr，我们将其称为gulp createpr --t $BB_TOKEN --b "develop" --o $BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER --s $BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG --d "$COMMIT_MESSAGES"其中 BB_TOKEN 是授权令牌， BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER 和 BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG 已在管道中可用，无需定义。 通过从 gulp 计数 BB_TOKEN 是第四项，因此我们可以将其用作process.argv[4]并且对于源分支（开发）可以称为process.argv[6]与其他变量相同。

 # nodejs image is required image: node:14.16.1 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN = $( curl -s -S -f -X POST -u " ${ BB_AUTH_STRING } " \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type = client_credentials -d scopes = "repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token' ) - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS = $( curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > export COMMITS = $( curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${ BB_TOKEN } " -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER } / ${ BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG } /commits" ) - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES = "" - export value = "" - > for i in $( jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< " $COMMITS " ) ; do value = $( jq -r ".values[ $i ]" <<< ${ COMMITS } ) message = $( jq -r '.message' <<< " $value " ) - if [[ " $message " != * "Merge" * ]] ; then COMMIT_MESSAGES = " $COMMIT_MESSAGES > " $message " \n\n " - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES - npm i -g gulp - gulp –tasks - gulp createpr --t $BB_TOKEN --b "develop" --o $BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER --s $BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG --d " $COMMIT_MESSAGES " –r $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS
 const gulp = require ( " gulp " ); const axios = require ( " axios " ). default ; gulp . task ( " createpr " , async () => { const headers = { " Content-Type " : " application/json " , Authorization : `Bearer ${ process . argv [ 4 ]} ` , }; const postData = { title : ` ${ process . argv [ 6 ]} ` , description : ` ${ process . argv [ 12 ]} ` , source : { branch : { name : ` ${ process . argv [ 6 ]} ` , }, }, destination : { branch : { name : " master " , }, }, close_source_branch : true , reviewers : process . argv [ 14 ] , }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/ ${ process . argv [ 8 ]} / ${ process . argv [ 10 ]} /pullrequests` ; const { data } = axios . post ( url , postData , { headers }); console . log ( data ) }

提交您的更改并推送。 检查 bitbucket 管道并创建拉取请求



原文:
  1. What is bitbucket pipelines, how and where it can be used
  2. What are the Advantages of automating pull requests in your project?
  3. Prerequisites for the automation to work
  4. Automate pull request with bitbucket pipelines
  5. Automate pull request with bitbucket pipelines and javascript

Bitbucket Pipelines is an integrated CI/CD service built into Bitbucket. It allows you to automatically build, test, and even deploy your code based on a configuration file in your repository. Essentially, we create containers in the cloud for you. Inside these containers, you can run commands (like you might on a local machine) but with all the advantages of a fresh system, customised and configured for your needs (Learn how to get started).

These commands include installing packages, making api requests using curl, storing variables, running javascript tasks and many more. Now that we have the advantages of storing variables and installing packages, making api requests and running javascript tasks we can create pull requests from one branch to another in your bitbucket repository.

Bitbucket pipelines can be used to automate several operations by simply running a series of commands as if you were running them from your terminal. These operations include but are not limited to creating pull requests, merging pull requests, deploying code to the remote server, unit tests, e2e tests, bumping versions in package.json files, read and write files and a lot more. At clickpesa we use bitbucket pipelines to do all those operations.

What are the Advantages of automating pull requests in your project?

  • Improve development process ( contributors don’t have to manually create PR to another branch )
  • Reduces human error such as creating PR to the wrong branch
  • Useful for the team with big number of members/developers
  • Helps in formatting PR descriptions. This helps Reviewers to understand what changes in the PR before merging to another branch.

Prerequisites

Authentication your workspace to be authorised to do operations on your behalf.

i. Create an OAuth Consumer in your workspace. Go to Your bitbucket workspace → settings → OAuth Consumers → Add consumer

ii. Fill in required information, especially the name and give your new consumer permissions for different operations but in our case we’ll give permission to read and write pull requests. Make sure to check the This is a private consumer checkbox and a callback url (you can add any url).

iii. After saving the consumer, click the consumer to view the key and secret

Open another tab and visit the repository where the pull request will be automated. If you do not have bitbucket pipelines in your repository you should skip this part for now and view step v. An admin access is needed for this action. After visiting the repository, go to Repository settings → Repository variables (here we should be able to add variables).

iv. Create a variable with any name say BB_AUTH_STRING and the values should be added as key:value for instance VzW7ubArG8T3huEDXs:eRNqGCycMVPvfzsGhEyd7xP33tYLd2jZ, this variable should be secured. Now we can use this value as a variable in the pipeline to authenticate users.

v. ( if you haven’t set up pipelines in your project ) In the repository on the side bar visit pipelines → Select starter pipeline → Commit the pipeline to your repository. Congratulations, you have created your first bitbucket pipelines, after this process go back to step c.

Steps

NB: .yml files has set of rules in its scripting such as indentation rules

Creating pull request using only pipelines

i. We already have the pipelines created, delete all the items and let’s start afresh, let's run hello world script using pipeline, the bitbucket pipelines contains a bunch of pipelines per user’s choice, for now let's stick with branches, the pipeline will only work if changes are pushed to the branch

pipelines: branches: master: - step: name: first pipelines script: - echo " - ✨ Hello World!!"

Output

ii. Enough of these simple things, let's dive to the main topic. First we will need to create a new branch say develop which we will automate the pull request from develop to master branch.

  • In the pipeline change the branch name from master to develop. Then install curl and jq, curl is used to make api requests in the terminal and jq is used to format responses. 
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq

iii. Using the authentication variable we saved earlier, create a curl request to fetch authorization token. Store it in a bitbucket variable, say BB_TOKEN. Use jq to extract a token from the response.

pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - echo $BB_TOKEN
  • Let’s create our first pull request with pipelines. 
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - echo $BB_TOKEN - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description": "", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": '[]' }’
  • Congratulations, you have created your first PR with pipelines

iv. We have created the simplest request for pull request, on the complex part we need to add default reviewers and descriptions (from the commits) dynamically.

  • First fetch default reviewers of the project by running another curl request just before creating pull request. Format the response with jq to only contain an array of uuid of reviewers, a contributor cannot be a reviewer. 
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - echo $BB_TOKEN - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS=$(curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS
  • Pass the created array of default reviewers in the pull request payload. 
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - echo $BB_TOKEN - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS=$(curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description": "", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": '"${DEFAULT_REVIEWERS}"' }’

v. Adding commits in the pull request descriptions, first let's fetch commits, commits can be fetched by comparing changes between two branches, in our case we compare branch develop and master and the differences are the commits that we will send as pull request descriptions. In this part we can have commits from other branches that will include commits messages starting with merged in {branch name} which we we don’t need to show it to the reviewers, commits can be filtered to omit unwanted commits, create an empty string variable and loop the returned commits , in each loop append the commit if it fits in the empty string.

pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - > export COMMITS=$(curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/commits") - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES="" - export value="" - > for i in $(jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< "$COMMITS"); do value=$(jq -r ".values[$i]" <<< ${COMMITS}) message=$(jq -r '.message' <<< "$value") - if [[ "$message" != *"Merge"* ]]; then COMMIT_MESSAGES="$COMMIT_MESSAGES> "$message"\n\n" - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES
  • Add the obtained string in the description part of the pull request payload and commit, the title of pull request can be altered dynamically as well. 
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS=$(curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > export COMMITS=$(curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/commits") - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES="" - export value="" - > for i in $(jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< "$COMMITS"); do value=$(jq -r ".values[$i]" <<< ${COMMITS}) message=$(jq -r '.message' <<< "$value") - if [[ "$message" != *"Merge"* ]]; then COMMIT_MESSAGES="$COMMIT_MESSAGES> "$message"\n\n" - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES - > curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/pullrequests \ -s -S -X POST \ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" \ -d '{ "title": "Automated Pull request", "description":"'"${COMMIT_MESSAGES}"'", "source": { "branch": { "name": "develop" } }, "destination": { "branch": { "name": "master" } }, "close_source_branch": false, "reviewers": '"${DEFAULT_REVIEWERS}"' }’
  • By playing around with this at a certain point pull request creation will return error 400 - Bad request and will give no further error descriptions. Don't worry there is a solution for this.

Alternative solution (Using javascript)

  1. Pull requests can be created using javascript using fetch api or axios. 
 const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json", Authorization: `Bearer ${authorization token}`, }; const postData = { title: `title`, description: `description`, source: { branch: { name: `develop`, }, }, destination: { branch: { name: "master", }, }, close_source_branch: false, reviewers: [], }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${repo_owner}/${repo_name}/pullrequests`
const { data } = axios.post(url, postData, { headers });
console.log(data)

ii. But this function can’t be called directly in the pipeline, this is where Gulp Js comes in. For this to happen we need to install several packages, (nodejs is required for this operation)

npm install gulp axios –save-dev
  • Create a file called gulpfile.js.
  • With gulp we can create a task in javascript and call that task in the pipeline which will call the function defined by that task in javascript.
  • Create a task createpr in the gulpfile. Commit your changes and push. Check the bitbucket pipelines and pull requests will be created 
const gulp = require("gulp");
const axios = require("axios").default; gulp.task("createpr", async () => { const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json", // make sure to pass the token Authorization: `Bearer ${authorization_token}`, }; const postData = { title: “title”, description: “”, source: { branch: { name: “develop”, }, }, destination: { branch: { name: "master", }, }, close_source_branch: false, reviewers: [], }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${repo_owner}/${repo_name}/pullrequests` const { data } = axios.post(url, postData, { headers }); console.log(data)
}

# nodejs image is required
image: node:14.16.1 pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq # install gulp globally - npm i -g gulp # this will list all defined tasks in the gulpfile we’ve created - gulp –tasks - gulp createpr # this will call the function we defined to create pull request.

iii. Since we need variables from the pipeline such as authorization token, branch name, repo name, commits etc, The task will receive variables from the pipeline using process.argv[variable number] the variable number is the position of the variable defined in the pipeline for instance our task is createpr, we’ll call it as gulp createpr --t $BB_TOKEN --b "develop" --o $BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER --s $BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG --d "$COMMIT_MESSAGES" where BB_TOKEN is the authorization token, BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER and BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG are already available in the pipeline and doesn’t need to be defined. By counting from gulp BB_TOKEN is the fourth item hence we can use it as process.argv[4] and for the source branch (develop) can be called as process.argv[6] same goes to other variables.

# nodejs image is required
image: node:14.16.1
pipelines: branches: develop: - step: name: automate pull request script: - apt-get update - apt-get -y install curl jq - > export BB_TOKEN=$(curl -s -S -f -X POST -u "${BB_AUTH_STRING}" \ https://bitbucket.org/site/oauth2/access_token \ -d grant_type=client_credentials -d scopes="repository" | jq --raw-output '.access_token') - > export DEFAULT_REVIEWERS=$(curl https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/default-reviewers \ -s -S -f -X GET \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" | jq '.values' | jq 'map({uuid})' ) - echo $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS - > export COMMITS=$(curl -H "Authorization: Bearer ${BB_TOKEN}" -d "include=develop" -d "exclude=master" "https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER}/${BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG}/commits") - echo $COMMITS - export COMMIT_MESSAGES="" - export value="" - > for i in $(jq '.values | keys | .[]' <<< "$COMMITS"); do value=$(jq -r ".values[$i]" <<< ${COMMITS}) message=$(jq -r '.message' <<< "$value") - if [[ "$message" != *"Merge"* ]]; then COMMIT_MESSAGES="$COMMIT_MESSAGES> "$message"\n\n" - fi done - echo $COMMIT_MESSAGES - npm i -g gulp - gulp –tasks - gulp createpr --t $BB_TOKEN --b "develop" --o $BITBUCKET_REPO_OWNER --s $BITBUCKET_REPO_SLUG --d "$COMMIT_MESSAGES" –r $DEFAULT_REVIEWERS


const gulp = require("gulp");
const axios = require("axios").default; gulp.task("createpr", async () => { const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json", Authorization: `Bearer ${process.argv[4]}`, }; const postData = { title: `${process.argv[6]}`, description: `${process.argv[12]}`, source: { branch: { name: `${process.argv[6]}`, }, }, destination: { branch: { name: "master", }, }, close_source_branch: true, reviewers: process.argv[14] , }; const url = `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/${process.argv[8]}/${process.argv[10]}/pullrequests`; const { data } = axios.post(url, postData, { headers }); console.log(data)
}

iv. Commit your changes and push. Check the bitbucket pipelines and pull requests will be created

item.title: 开源的 4 个 SaaS 套件 - Vue、Svelte、React 和 NET | Open-sourced 4 SaaS kits - Vue, Svelte, React, and NET
item.description:
亚历山德罗·马丁内斯

发表于在github.com/AlexandroMtzG下载前端或全栈样板以启动您的 SaaS。

我的博客上的原始帖子。

为什么要开源？

在对我的netcoresaas.com (Vue2 + NET)样板进行第一次提交2年后，然后使用saasfrontends.com (Vue3、Svelte 和 React)制作了另外 3 个 SaaS 工具包，我找到了我用过的最好的堆栈：混音+反应+ Tailwind CSS 。

现在是使用 Remix 💿 将 50% （我想全职）专注于我的企业级 SaaS 样板并开源我的其他 SaaS 工具包的好时机。

扔一颗星星⭐！

仅前端：

或者使用 .NET 后端：

  • 特征

所有这些在引擎盖下都有相同的堆栈：

使用 SaaS 页面：

  • 正面：登陆、定价、联系方式、条款和隐私。
  • 管理员：用户、租户、租户、定价和组件。
  • 核心：仪表板、未经授权、配置文件、工作区、成员、订阅、租户、链接、 LinkProfile 、客户和提供者。
  • 示例应用程序：合同、合同、新合同、雇员、雇员和新雇员。

现有客户

如果您是后端版本的现有客户，您可以免费获得我的Remix SaaS 套件，目前为v0.2.5 。

支持

如果您喜欢我的工作，请考虑赞助我进行更多开源项目😊。

查看我的博客或关注我以获取更多类似的内容😀！

Maarten Balliauw - Maarten Balliauw - Apr 19 4月19日



原文:

Alexandro Martinez

Posted on Apr 29

Download a front-end or a full-stack boilerplate to start your SaaS at github.com/AlexandroMtzG.

Original post on my blog.

Why open source?

After 2 years of making the first commit to my netcoresaas.com (Vue2 + NET) boilerplate and then making 3 more SaaS kits with saasfrontends.com (Vue3, Svelte, and React), I found the best stack I've ever used: Remix + React + Tailwind CSS.

This is a good time to focus 50% (I want to make it full-time) on my enterprise-level SaaS boilerplate with Remix 💿 and open source my other SaaS kits.

GitHub repositories

Throw a star ⭐!

Front-end only:

Or with a .NET back-end:

  • .NET + Vue2
  • .NET + Vue3
  • .NET + Svelte
  • .NET + React

Features

All of these have the same stack under the hood:

With SaaS pages:

  • Front: Landing, Pricing, Contact, Terms, and Privacy.
  • Auth: Login, Register, Forgot, Reset, Verify, Invitation, and Join Tenant.
  • Admin: Users, Tenants, Tenant, Pricing, and Components.
  • Core: Dashboard, Unauthorized, Profile, Workspaces, Members, Subscription, Tenant, Links, LinkProfile, Clients, and Providers.
  • Sample App: Contracts, Contract, New Contract, Employees, Employee, and New Employees.

Existing customers

If you're an existing customer of a back-end edition, you get my Remix SaaS kit for free, currently v0.2.5.

Support

If you like my work, consider sponsoring me for more open source projects 😊.

Check out my blog or follow me for more content like this 😀!

Maarten Balliauw - Apr 19

item.title: USB 驱动器错误和从损坏或不可操作的 USB 闪存驱动器中恢复数据 | USB Drive Errors and Recovering Data From a Damaged or Non-Operable USB Flash Drive
item.description:
阅读本文以了解有关 USB 闪存驱动器或磁盘出现问题的原因以及如何修复它们、如何从有故障的媒体中恢复数据的更多信息。 但是，突然损坏的 USB 驱动器会使您丢失数据。 本文将告诉您 USB 驱动器损坏的可能原因，以及修复它们和恢复丢失信息的方法。

与任何其他设备一样，USB 驱动器可能会受到可能导致设备损坏且其中包含的数据可能丢失的进程的影响。 不幸的是，这种情况可能会发生，它们使用户寻找修复 USB 驱动器并从损坏或无法操作的闪存驱动器中恢复数据的方法。 在本文中，我们将尝试考虑问题的原因并描述消除可能问题的可能方法。

然而，在我们开始描述可能导致 USB 驱动器损坏和可能丢失数据的问题之前，我们需要关注此类驱动器的内部设计，以便更好地了解它们的操作过程。

该驱动器具有 USB 连接器，可与任何计算机设备一起使用，并且可以在所有方面替代光盘。 驱动器非常轻便小巧； 由于没有移动部件，它们更可靠，而且它们的容量令人印象深刻。

现代技术能够生产容量为 2 TB 甚至更多的 USB 驱动器，同时保持标准尺寸。 然而，最流行的型号是容量从 32 到 256 GB 的闪存驱动器。 无噪音操作、与各种现代设备一起使用 USB 闪存驱动器的多功能性、低功耗、与光盘相比具有更好的抗机械影响能力，以及它们能够长时间自主存储数据的能力使 USB 闪存驱动器处于领先地位在其他可移动媒体中。

可能影响 USB 驱动器的问题

当连接到 PC 时，操作系统会从驱动器中提取数据以进行进一步传输或交换。 但是，在某个时刻，由于各种原因，对 USB 驱动器的访问可能会丢失。 例如，由于 USB 驱动器的不良设计或用户在连接或断开设备时施加的过度努力，可能会导致磁盘无法访问。

不管是什么原因，结果总是一样的——无法访问驱动器及其包含的数据。 例如，主引导记录 (MBR)、分区引导记录或 USB 驱动器的目录结构中不允许的数据使得在没有专门的软件的情况下无法提取其数据。

对众多用户投诉的分析表明，USB 驱动器的机械损坏导致问题的频率至少与此相同，如果不是更多的话。 它们包括：损坏的驱动器外壳和插头、所谓的死驱动器（有电源问题的驱动器）、损坏的电路或 NAND 存储芯片、无法识别并显示为 RAW 的驱动器、使用前需要格式化的驱动器、被拒绝访问的驱动器等等。 进一步，我们将详细描述可能的问题和消除它们的方法。

好消息是大多数损坏的 USB 闪存驱动器都可以修复或恢复。 它允许再次使用它们来存储和交换信息，或者至少可以安全地提取损坏驱动器中包含的数据。 然而，这种损坏只会带来永远丢失此类数据的小机会。

分析 USB 驱动器的问题

对驱动器的故障和错误进行初步诊断至关重要。 如果没有修复的可能性，这种初步分析的正确性决定了成功消除 USB 驱动器错误或完全恢复无法访问的数据。

任何导致 USB 闪存驱动器损坏的原因都可以分为两类：物理故障和逻辑错误。 根据诊断结果和检测到的驱动器损坏，进一步的操作会有所不同。

这就是为什么了解实际情况如此重要的原因：您的驱动器是否受到任何使其无法运行的物理影响？ 您的计算机是否识别驱动器并为其分配逻辑磁盘盘符，但由于逻辑错误而无法处理驱动器包含的信息？

如果是后者，您可以随时使用第三方软件或 Windows 操作系统的集成工具来消除对闪存驱动器的损坏或恢复访问并恢复用户数据。

但是，软件不适用于存在控制器问题或遭受不可逆机械损坏的驱动器。 在这种情况下，系统将无法识别驱动器，您必须避免运行任何软件来从损坏的磁盘中恢复数据。

在这种情况下，请仔细检查您的 USB 驱动器并标记所有损坏迹象。 如果印刷电路板受到物理损坏，则应在经过认证的数据恢复实验室进行维修或更换。 不要触摸电路板上的任何芯片或接头。 同样，请勿触摸驱动器的任何开放部分。 闪存驱动器非常容易受到灰尘和静电放电的影响，尤其是当它们的内部部件暴露于各种环境因素时。 很多时候，物理损坏的存在建议使用合格专家的帮助。

如果计算机无法识别 USB 驱动器，则初步检查它

一般来说，这个问题可能是由几个因素引起的，这些因素决定了驱动器在直接连接到个人计算机或其他设备时是否可以被识别。 现在是时候运行一个简单的检查，以排除有时被误认为是 USB 闪存驱动器损坏的可能原因。 依次执行，直到问题排除，或确认驱动器处于不可操作状态。

有时，特定 USB 驱动器型号与用户的计算机设备不兼容会导致计算机的操作系统无法识别该驱动器。 这意味着您的驱动器绝对没问题，但由于某种原因，它无法与特定设备正确交互。 检查它的最快方法是将 USB 驱动器连接到另一台计算机或笔记本电脑。 如果问题已经解决并且现在可以正确识别驱动器，请确保您不再将它用于有问题的特定计算机。 但是，如果其他计算机也无法识别此类 USB 驱动器，则驱动器很可能已损坏，您需要采取一些措施来消除该问题。

计算机端口故障

计算机无法识别 USB 驱动器的可能原因之一是端口故障 - 仅通过目视检查无法识别的问题。 所以在开始修复U盘之前，请确保电脑的USB接口工作正常，识别驱动器的问题出在驱动器上，而不是电脑上。

要检查 USB 端口，请移除 USB 驱动器，重新启动计算机并再次连接 USB 闪存驱动器以查看问题是否消失。 您用于连接此类驱动器的一个或多个端口很可能出现故障，但其他端口仍然可以使用。 这就是为什么您应该测试您计算机中的每个端口，或者通过您知道肯定是健康的端口将 USB 闪存驱动器连接到另一台计算机。

有时当您将USB驱动器连接到计算机设备时，USB插头的一部分与端口接触不良，因此无法识别驱动器。

在这种情况下，尝试将卡在计算机端口中的驱动器从一侧稍微移动到另一侧，以便尽可能获得更好的接触。 确保不要用力推动驱动器——你不想损坏它，对吧？ 如果您设法改善了接触，您可以通过驱动器的 LED 指示灯闪烁以及操作系统的声音通知警告您已连接新设备来看到它。

建立联系后，尽量将驱动器保持在良好的工作位置，并立即将其所有数据传输到个人计算机或笔记本电脑的内部存储器中，以避免可能的信息丢失。

由于 U 盘版本的某些限制，有时安装的 Windows 操作系统版本可能无法识别 U 盘。

您可以允许使用集成系统工具识别 USB 闪存驱动器。 以您喜欢的任何方式打开设备管理器应用程序。 例如，右键单击桌面左下角任务栏上的“开始”按钮，或者按 Windows + X 键序列来打开上下文菜单。 从出现的上下文菜单中的可能应用程序列表中选择设备管理器。

在设备管理器窗口中，找到磁盘驱动器部分并通过单击部分名称旁边的黑色箭头展开列表。

在可用设备列表中找到所需的 USB 闪存驱动器。 双击它，或右键单击它并从菜单中选择属性。

在驱动器属性窗口中，打开驱动程序选项卡，然后单击主窗口中的启用设备按钮。

现在 USB 驱动器已启用并准备好工作。 然后单击确定保存所做的更改。

在某些情况下，操作系统无法将盘符分配给新的逻辑 USB 分区，因此用户必须通过几个简单的步骤自行分配该盘符。

使用我们上面描述的方法——例如，按下 Windows + X 快捷方式，您可以打开上下文菜单。 从可用应用程序列表中，选择磁盘管理部分。

在磁盘管理窗口中，找到卷，突出显示 USB 闪存驱动器并右键单击它。 从上下文菜单中，选择行更改驱动器号或路径。

在编辑驱动器号的窗口中单击添加，然后键入新的驱动器号，然后单击确定以保存您选择的驱动器号。


现在 U 盘已经分配了您选择的字母，被系统正确识别，并且可以用来存储信息。

从本文前面的部分可以看出，USB 闪存驱动器损坏的原因可能会有所不同，但根据损坏的类型（逻辑或物理），它们都属于这两类之一。 驱动器物理损坏的主要原因是 USB 插头或其触点损坏、电路板损坏、导致无法识别设备的电源问题等。 其中大部分可以通过更换有故障的元件来修复。

但是，当用户缺乏技能和知识但仍试图在没有专家帮助的情况下修复驱动器时，情况甚至会变得更糟。 因此，即使对于专业人士来说，进一步维修的过程也会变得更加困难，并且这种驱动器有可能无法恢复。

在大多数情况下，用户无法消除他们检测到的磁盘问题，因为这需要由具有相应知识和技能的专家操作的专业且昂贵的设备。 但是，您可以尝试自行修复一些物理损坏问题。 首先，我们的意思是重新焊接USB驱动器插头的触点。

在执行焊接操作时，您必须非常小心，因为设备内部设计的微小细节使任务更具挑战性，并且错误可能会产生不可逆转的后果。 焊接工具的粗心移动可能会烧毁或熔化集成电路，焊接区域可能会重叠，或者它们可能会与连接到计算机所需的驱动器的其他组件产生短路。 另一个普遍的错误是USB插头触点连接错误，由于错误的电源方案导致内存芯片和其他组件损坏。

如果您决定自行修复 USB 驱动器以防出现机械损坏，则应遵循特定程序。

  1. 打开 U 盘盒。 您应该非常小心，以免使用用于打开驱动器塑料外壳的工具损坏印刷电路板和其他元件。 一个粗心的错误可能会破坏您成功修复的所有机会。 如果您在打开机箱时损坏了 NAND 存储芯片，您的数据将永远消失。

  2. 检查内部元件是否损坏。 首先，检查USB插头与PCB（印刷电路板）在焊锡覆盖区域的接触是否断开。 如果有缺陷，任何具有高级维修技能的人都可以按照下面描述的程序进行修复。

如果您在 PCB 上看到损坏的元件，例如整个电路板的裂缝、烧毁的迹象、晶体振荡器损坏、NAND 内存芯片损坏、电容器或电阻器鼓胀等 - 此 USB 驱动器不值得维修，因为存在丢失所有数据的风险和恢复这种驱动器的可能性很小。

  1. 修复联系人。 小心焊接损坏的触点，或更换新的 USB 插头并使用焊接工具正确连接触点。 修复工作结束后，将 USB 驱动器连接到计算机并复制驱动器包含的所有数据。 如果您无法连接U盘，则说明您的操作还不够，是时候使用其他方法了。

其中之一是联系专门的实验室。 除了尝试修复 USB 闪存驱动器失败的情况外，对于 USB 驱动器物理损坏的其他原因，此选项也可以接受。

高科技昂贵设备（例如，从 NAND 存储芯片读取的工具）、将存储设备与灰尘和其他颗粒完全隔离的无菌实验室设施、先进的软件和高素质的专家相结合，几乎可以修复所有类型损坏并完全恢复用户数据。

在经过认证和受控的环境中进行任何维修都非常重要。 否则，驱动器可能会因各种颗粒的污染而严重损坏。 尽管 USB 闪存驱动器对污染损坏的敏感性低于硬盘驱动器 (HDD)，但避免不必要的风险仍然是明智之举，尤其是当闪存驱动器用于存储至关重要的数据时。 应特别注意实验室的认证等级，以保证实验室没有任何污染颗粒并降低损坏驱动器的风险，并注意相应制造商提供的用于修复驱动器的合规证书的可用性。

然而，尽管专业实验室有众多优势，但它的服务也有一些缺点，最大的缺点是价格非常高，而且不能保证数据会成功恢复。 无论最终结果如何，您都必须为所提供的所有服务全额付费，即使数据未恢复且驱动器不再适合进一步使用。

这就是为什么如果 USB 驱动器受到物理损坏，只要您决定联系专业实验室修复驱动器或恢复数据，您就应该准备好面对巨额费用。

阅读包含所有其他视频教程的完整文章。 也访问我们的Youtube 频道，有超过 400 个视频教程。



原文:

Read this article to learn more about causes of problems with USB flash drives or disks and how to fix them, how to recover data from a faulty media. USB drives can easily be connected to any device and they are widely used to store various information. However, a USB drive suddenly breaking down can make you lose your data. This article will tell you about possible causes for USB drives to get damaged, and about the ways to repair them and recover the lost information.

As well any other device, USB drives can be affected by processes that may get the device broken and the data they contain might be lost. Unfortunately, such situations may occur and they make users look for ways to repair the USB drive and recover data from damaged or non-operable flash drives. In this article, we will try to consider the causes of trouble and describe possible ways to eliminate the possible problems.

Design of a USB Flash Drive

Yet before we start describing the problems that may result in possible damage to USB drives and probable loss of data, we need to focus on the inner design of such drives for better understanding of their operating processes.

A USB drive (also known as a USB disk, or a flash drive) is a non-mechanical memory device based on semiconductor technology of programmable flash memory for writing and storing data. The drive has a USB connector for using with any computer device and can replace an optical disk in all regards. USB drives are removable and completely rewritable which makes them very convenient to use for storage and exchange of information every time such need arises. The drives are very light and small; they are more reliable due to having no moving parts, and their capacity can be impressive.

The main elements of a USB drive are the microcontroller that manages the device, the flash memory chip (NAND chip), the USB interface for physical connection to a computer device, and a crystal oscillator to produce the synchronizing signal.

Modern technologies enable production of USB drives with capacities of two terabytes and even more while retaining standard dimensions. However, the most popular models are flash drives ranging from 32 to 256 gigabytes in capacity. Noiseless operation, versatility of using USB flash drives with all kinds of modern devices, low power consumption, better resistance to mechanical influence when compared to optical disks, and their ability to store data autonomously for a long time bring USB flash drives to the top position among other removable media.

The Problems That May Affect a USB Drive

USB drives allow quick and easy way to store data like on an ordinary hard disk due to their memory peculiarities. When connected to a PC, the operating system extracts data from the drive for further transmission or exchange. However, at a certain moment the access to the USB drive may be lost, and for a variety of reasons. For example, because of the bad design of the USB drive or excessive efforts applied by the user when connecting or disconnecting the device may render the disk inaccessible.

Whatever the reason, the result is always the same – no access to the drive and the data it contains. For example, inadmissible data in the master boot record (MBR), partition boot record or directory structure of a USB drive make it impossible to extract its data without specialized software.

Analysis of numerous user complaints shows that mechanical damage to USB drives causes the trouble at least as frequently, if not more often. They include as follows: broken drive cases and plugs, the so-called dead drives (the ones having power supply problems), damaged circuitry or NAND memory chips, drives that cannot be recognized and shown as RAW, drives that require formatting before use, drives with denied access and so on. Further on, we will describe in detail the possible problems and ways of eliminating them.

The good news is that the majority of damaged USB flash drives can be repaired or restored. It allows to use them again for storing and exchanging information, or at least, to extract safely the data contained in the damaged drives. USB drives use nonvolatile media without moving parts which excludes risks for loss of data almost entirely, except for mechanical damage to the memory chip which actually contains the user data; such damage, however, presents only a small chance to lose such data forever.

Analyzing problems with USB drives

Preliminary diagnostics of the drive for faults and errors is of primary importance. The correctness of such preliminary analysis determines the success in eliminating the USB drive errors or complete recovery of inaccessible data, if there are no possibilities to repair it.

Any causes of damage to a USB flash drive can be classified into two groups: physical faults and logical errors. Depending on the diagnostics results and the detected damage to the drive, further actions will differ.

That is why it is so important to find out what the actual situation is: was your drive subjected to any physical influence that made it inoperable? Does your computer recognize the drive and assign it a logic disk letter but can’t process the information the drive contains because of logical errors?

If the latter is true, you can always use third-party software or integrated tools of the Windows operating system to eliminate the damage or restore access to the flash drive and recover user data.

However, software won’t work with the drives that have controller issues or have been subjected to irreversible mechanical damage. In this case, the drive won’t be recognized by the system and you will have to avoid running any software to recover data from the damaged disk.

In that case, examine your USB drive carefully and mark down all signs of damage. If the printed circuit board is physically damaged, it should be repaired or replaced at a certified data recovery lab. Don’t touch any chips or joints on the circuit board. Similarly, don’t touch any open parts of the drive. Flash drives are very vulnerable to dirt and electrostatic discharge, especially when their inner parts are exposed to all kinds of environmental factors. Quite often, presence of physical damage suggests using assistance from qualified specialists.

Preliminary Check for the USB Drive if it is Not Recognized by the Computer

Generally, this problem can be caused by several factors which determine if the drive can be recognized or not when directly connected to a personal computer or another device. Now it’s time to run a simple check meant to exclude possible causes which are sometimes mistaken for damage to the USB flash drive. Perform one action after another until the problems are eliminated, or the inoperable status of the drive is confirmed.

USB Drive Compatibility

Sometimes incompatibility of a specific USB drive model with a user’s computer device results in the computer’s operating system being unable to recognize the drive. It means that your drive is absolutely all right but for some reason, it cannot interact properly with a specific device. The quickest method to check it is by connecting the USB drive to another computer or laptop. If the problem has been solved and the drive is now recognized properly, just make sure you don’t use it again with that specific computer it has problems with. Yet if other computers also fail to recognize such USB drive, there are high chances that the drive is damaged and you need to take some action to eliminate the problem.

Faulty Computer Port

One of the possible causes why a USB drive is not recognized by the computer is a faulty port – a problem that cannot be identified by visual examination only. So before you start repairing the USB drive, make sure the computer’s USB port works properly, and the problem with recognizing the drive comes from the drive, and not from the computer.

To check the USB port, remove the USB drive, restart the computer and connect the USB flash drive again to see if the problem is gone. It is quite possible that one or several ports that you use to connect such drives are out of order, but the other ports are still operable. That is why you should test every port you have in your computer, or connect the USB flash drive to another computer through a port which you know is certainly healthy.

Poor Contact Between the USB drive and the Computer

Sometimes when you connect a USB drive to a computer device, a part of the USB plug doesn’t have good contact with the port, and therefore the drive cannot be recognized.

In this case, try to move the drive slightly from side to side while it’s stuck in the computer’s port to get a better contact if possible. Make sure you don’t push the drive too hard – you don’t want to damage it, right? If you managed to improve the contact, you can see it by the drive’s LED indicator blinking, and by the sound notification of the operating system warning you that a new device has been connected.

When the contact is established, try to maintain the drive in the good working position and transfer all of its data immediately to the internal storage of your personal computer or laptop to avoid possible loss of information.

USB drive Limitations

Sometimes the installed version of the Windows operating system may not recognize the USB drive due to certain limitations of the USB drive version.

You can allow recognizing the USB flash drive with the integrated system tool. Open the Device Manager app in any way you prefer. For example, right-click on the Start button that you can find on the Taskbar, in the left lower corner of the desktop, or press the key sequence Windows + X instead to open the context menu. Select Device Manager from the list of possible apps in context menu that appears.

In the Device Manager window, find the Disk drives section and unfold the list by clicking on the black arrow next to the section name.

Find the required USB flash drive in the list of available devices. Double-click on it, or right-click on it and select Properties from the menu.

In the drive properties window, open the Driver tab and click on the button Enable device in the main window.

Now the USB drive is enabled and ready for work. Then click OK to save the changes you have made.

In some cases, the operating system cannot assign the drive letter to the new logical USB partition, so users have to assign this letter on their own by taking several simple steps.

Using the method we described above – for example, pressing the Windows + X shortcut, you can open the context menu. From the list of available apps, select the section Disk Management.

In the Disk Management window, find the line Volume, highlight the USB flash drive and right-click on it. From the context menu, choose the line Change drive letter or path.

In the window for editing the drive letter click on Add, then type the new drive letter, and then click OK to save the letter you have chosen.


Now the USB flash drive has been assigned the letter you chose, is recognized by the system properly, and can be used to store information.

Physical Damage to a USB Flash Drive

As you can see from the previous parts of this article, the causes of damage to USB flash drive may vary, but all of them fall into one of the two categories by the type of damage (logical or physical). The main causes behind physical damage to the drive are broken USB plug or its contacts, damaged circuit board, power issues that cause trouble with recognizing the device and so on. Most of these can be repaired by just replacing the faulty element.

However, when a user lacks skill and knowledge but still tries to repair the drive without a specialist’s help, the things can even get worse. As a result, the process of further repairs can become more difficult, even for a professional, and there are chances that such drive could not be restored.

In most cases, users can’t eliminate the disk problems they have detected because it requires specialized and expensive equipment operated by specialists possessing corresponding knowledge and skills. However, you can try fixing some physical damage issues on your own. First of all, we mean re-soldering the contacts of USB drive plug.

When performing soldering operations, you have to be extremely careful as the tiny details of the device’s inner design make the task much more challenging, and a mistake can have irreversible consequences. A careless move of the soldering tool can burn or melt an integrated circuit, the areas of soldering may overlap, or they may produce a short circuit with other components of the drive that are required to connect to the computer. Another widespread mistake is wrong connection of USB plug contacts which results in damage to the memory chip and other components because of the wrong power scheme.

If you decide to repair a USB drive on your own in case of mechanical damage, you should follow a certain procedure.

  1. Open the USB flash drive case. You should be careful enough to avoid damaging the printed circuit board and other elements with the tool that you are using to open the drive’s plastic case. A single careless mistake can destroy all your chances for successful repair. If you damage the NAND memory chip when opening the case, your data will be gone forever.

  2. Examine the inner elements for damage. First of all, check if the contact is broken between the USB plug and the PCB (printed circuit board) in areas covered with solder. If there is a defect, anyone having advanced repair skills can fix it by following the procedure described below.

If you see damaged elements on the PCB like cracks all over the board, signs of burning, broken crystal oscillator, damaged NAND memory chip, bulging capacitors or resistors etc – this USB drive is not worth repairing due to the risk of losing all data and tiny chances of recovering such a drive.

  1. Repairing contacts. Solder the broken contact carefully, or replace the USB plug with a new one and use the soldering tool to connect the contacts properly. When the repair works are over, connect the USB drive to the computer and copy all data the drive contains. If you failed to connect the USB drive, it means your actions were not enough, and it is time to use another method.

One of them is contacting a specialized laboratory. Apart from the case with an unsuccessful attempt at repairing a USB flash drive, such option can be acceptable for other causes of physical damage to USB drives.

The combination of high-tech expensive equipment (for example, tools to read from NAND memory chips), sterile lab facilities that isolate a memory device completely from dust and other particles, advanced software and highly qualified specialists makes it possible to repair almost all kinds of damage and recover the user data entirely.

It is very important to perform any repairs in a certified and controlled environment. Otherwise, the drive may be seriously damaged by contamination with various particles. Though USB flash drives are less sensitive to contamination damage than hard disk drives (HDD), still it would be wise to avoid unnecessary risks especially when the flash drive is used to store crucially important data. Special attention should be paid to the lab’s certification class that guarantees absence of any polluting particles from the lab and reduces the risk of damaging the drive, and to the availability of a certificate of compliance for repairing drives supplied by a corresponding manufacturer.

Nevertheless, with all the numerous advantages of a specialized lab, its services have some disadvantages, the biggest ones being very high prices and, alas, no guarantee that the data will be recovered successfully. Regardless of the final result, you will have to pay in full for all the services provided, even if the data was not recovered and the drive is no longer good for further use.

That is why if a USB drive is damaged physically, you should be ready to face considerable expenses as long as you decided to contact a specialized lab to repair your drive or recover your data.

Read the full article with all additional video tutorials. Also visit our Youtube channel, there are over 400 video tutorials.
item.author: hetmansoftware

item.title: 使用 vue 处理 URL 的更好方法使用 useFetch() + useUrl() | A better way to work with URLs using vueUse useFetch() + useUrl()
item.description:
艾哈迈德·查胡姆

发表于考虑以下 URL：

 "https://somedomain.com/api/v1/entity/:id/subentity?search=query&sort=property&limit=100&page=1&filters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash"

这个网址由很多部分组成：

  1. 基本网址： https://somedomain.com ://somedomain.com
  2. 路径： /api/v1/entity/:id/subentity?search=query&sort=property&limit=100&page=1&someFilters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash
  3. 路径变量： /:id/'
  4. 查询参数： search sort limit page filters
  5. 哈希后缀： #someHash

仅使用字符串插值或自定义代码来使用 REST API/链接来更改查询参数或路径变量，这可能会变得非常麻烦且乏味
特别是在使用 VueUse 的useFetch ()钩子时，因为它没有像axios 之类的库那样处理（参数、路径变量等）的内置方法

解决方案：

我制作了一个 Vue.js 组合 API 钩子vue-useUrl以一种方便的方式解决了这个问题

让我们使用useUrl()重做前面的示例

const { url , queryParams , pathVariables , hash , path , disableCSV } = useUrl ({ path : ' /api/v1/entity/:id/subentity ' , pathVariables : { id : 1001 }, queryParams : { search : ' query ' , sort : ' propery ' , limit : 100 , page : 1 , filters : [ ' filter1 ' , ' filter2 ' , ' filter3 ' ] }, hash : ' someHash ' }, ' https://somedomain.com ' ) console . log ( url . value ) // return https:/somedomain.com/api/v1/entity/0/subentity?search=query&sort=propery&limit=100&page=1&filters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash

您可以使用查询参数、路径变量、哈希、路径作为 javascript 变量，很酷的事情是更改此变量的任何值都会触发 URL 重建， url将始终反映查询更改

与 useFetch() 集成：

 import { useFetch } from " @vueuse/core " import { useUrl } from " vue-useurl " export function useApi () { const { url , queryParams , pathVariables , path } = useUrl ({ path : ' /users/random_user ' , queryParams : { size : 10 }, pathVariables : {}, hash : '' }, ' https://random-data-api.com/api ' ) const { isFetching , error , data } = useFetch < any [] > ( url , { initialData : { results : [] }, refetch : true } ) . get () . json () return { isFetching , error , data , url , queryParams , pathVariables , path } }

沃拉迪米尔·叶皮舍夫—— Apr 13 4月13日



原文:

Ahmed Chakhoum

Posted on Apr 29

consider the following URL:

"https://somedomain.com/api/v1/entity/:id/subentity?search=query&sort=property&limit=100&page=1&filters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash"

there's alot of parts this url is composed of:

  1. Base URL: https://somedomain.com
  2. Path: /api/v1/entity/:id/subentity?search=query&sort=property&limit=100&page=1&someFilters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash
  3. Path Variables: /:id/'
  4. Query Parameters: search sort limit page filters
  5. Hash suffix: #someHash

working with REST APIs / Links using only string interpolation or custom code to change query parameters or path variables this can get very cumbersome and quite tedious
specially when using the useFetch() hook from VueUse, since it have no built-in way to deal with (params, path variables..etc) similar to a library like axios have

Solution:

I made a Vue.js Composition API hook vue-useUrl that solve this problem in a convenient way

let's redo the previous example using useUrl()

const { url, queryParams, pathVariables, hash, path, disableCSV } = useUrl({ path: '/api/v1/entity/:id/subentity', pathVariables: { id: 1001 }, queryParams: { search: 'query', sort: 'propery', limit: 100, page: 1, filters: [ 'filter1', 'filter2', 'filter3' ] }, hash: 'someHash'
}, 'https://somedomain.com') console.log(url.value) // return https:/somedomain.com/api/v1/entity/0/subentity?search=query&sort=propery&limit=100&page=1&filters=filter1,filter2,filter3#someHash

you can work with query parameters, path variables, hash, path as a javascript variables, and the cool thing is changing any value from this variables will trigger an URL rebuild, url will always reflect query changes

Integration with useFetch(): 

import { useFetch } from "@vueuse/core"
import { useUrl } from "vue-useurl" export function useApi() { const { url, queryParams, pathVariables, path } = useUrl({ path: '/users/random_user', queryParams: { size: 10 }, pathVariables: {}, hash: '' }, 'https://random-data-api.com/api') const { isFetching, error, data } = useFetch<any[]>( url, { initialData: { results: [] }, refetch: true } ) .get() .json() return { isFetching, error, data, url, queryParams, pathVariables, path }
}

NPM Package
Github repo

Volodymyr Yepishev - Apr 13

item.title: 使用 GitHub Copilot 理解您的代码 | Understand your code using GitHub Copilot
item.description:
无论您是经验丰富的编码人员，还是刚刚起步， GitHub Copilot的新功能都会引起所有人的关注。

如果您有权访问 GitHub Copilot，则可以下载附加扩展程序GitHub Copilot Labs 。 这使您可以访问一些很酷的新功能。 其中一项功能以通俗易懂的语言解释了您拥有的代码。 让我们向您展示如何做到这一点。

步骤 1. 安装 Copilot Labs

确保您已安装GitHub Copilot *。 如果您有权访问 Copilot，您还可以下载并安装GitHub Copilot Labs 。

打开你的VS Code编辑器并打开一个包含你想要解释的代码的文件。

另外，请确保您已打开 Copilot。 您可以在左侧底部托盘中找到 Copilot 图标。 单击它，并确保选择“启用”。

我总是单击“全局启用”，因为这样 Copilot 适用于所有内容，而不仅仅是我打开的文件。

步骤 3. GitHub Copilot Labs 侧边栏

您会在屏幕左侧找到工具栏。 如果看不到它，请单击省略号，您将找到已安装的任何其他扩展的列表。

仅当您已安装 GitHub Copilot Labs 时才会出现 GitHub Copilot Labs 图标。 单击该图标，它将切换打开一个新窗格。 如果您的代码仍然突出显示，您的屏幕应该如下所示：

步骤 4. 突出显示代码

现在您已打开 Copilot Labs 侧边栏，请突出显示您希望更好地理解的代码块。

第 5 步。解释代码

在此部分下，将出现您突出显示的代码，以及一个显示“解释代码”的框。

在这里，您可以选择如何解释代码。 你可以选择：

  • 选择一个，然后单击“询问副驾驶”。 您的结果将立即显示：

    由于这是一个学习工具，每次“询问副驾驶”时，您可能会看到略有不同的结果。 尝试各种语言并比较不同的结果。 这是更好地学习和理解代码的好方法。

    第 6 步：反馈

    它们都处于技术预览阶段。 解释完您的代码后，您将能够就 Copilot 的表现提供反馈。

    您可以访问 Copilot 网站并单击右上角的“了解更多”，了解更多关于 GitHub Copilot 的工作原理以及支持该技术的训练集。 另请查看我们的教程， 了解 Copilot 如何将代码翻译成其他语言。

    如果您想注册技术预览版，请加入候补名单。



原文:

Whether you're a seasoned coder, or just starting out, GitHub Copilot's new feature will have everyone in a buzz.

If you have access to GitHub Copilot, you can download an additional extension, GitHub Copilot Labs. This gives you access to some cool new features. One of these features explains the code you have in plain language. Let's show you how to do that.

Step 1. Install Copilot Labs

Make sure you have GitHub Copilot installed*. If you have access to Copilot, you'll also be able download and install GitHub Copilot Labs.

Step 2. Choose code to explain

Open your VS Code editor and open a file with code you want explained.

Also, make sure you have Copilot turned on. You can find the Copilot icon in the bottom tray on the left hand side. Click it, and sure you select "Enable".

I always click "Enable Globally" because then Copilot works for everything and not just the file I have open.

Step 3. GitHub Copilot Labs sidebar

The GitHub Copilot Labs sidebar has everything you need to explain and translate code. You'll find the toolbar on the left side of the screen. If you can't see it, click the ellipses and you'll find a list of any additional extensions you have installed.

The GitHub Copilot Labs icon will only appear if you have installed GitHub Copilot Labs. Click the icon and it will toggle open a new pane. If you still have your code highlighted, your screen should look something like:

Step 4. Highlight Code

Now that you have the Copilot Labs sidebar open, highlight the chunk of code you'd like to better understand.

Step 5. Explain Code

The GitHub Copilot Labs pane will show a section called "Explain". Under this section, your highlighted code will appear, along with a box saying "Explain code".

Here, you can choose how you want the code explained. You can choose:

  • "Explain code": step by step what the code is checking for and what it is outputting.
  • "Code does following": brief summary of what the code is does.
  • "Code does following (English)": detailed explain (in plain English) of what the code does.
  • "Show example code": provides an input example and shows how the code calls a function and works.

Select one, and click "Ask Copilot". Your result will be immediately displayed:

Since this is a learning tool, you might be shown a slightly different result each time you "Ask Copilot". Experiment with various languages and compare the different results. This is a great way to learn and understand your code better.

Step 6. Feedback

GitHub Copilot and GitHub Copilot Labs are very new features. They are both in technical preview stage. After your code has been explained you'll be able to provide feedback on how well Copilot did.

You can read more about how GitHub Copilot works and the training set that powers this technology by heading to the Copilot website, and clicking "Learn more" in the top right. Also check out our tutorial on how Copilot can translate code into other languages.

*GitHub Copilot is in technical preview, and thus not all users will be able to access this feature. If you'd like to sign up to the technical preview, please join the waitlist.
